name: engineering-quality-governor
description: Govern software engineering work with always-on strategic intake, project health audits, code reuse prospecting, scoped tool guidance, auditable planning, architecture rules, security checks, and quality gates.

interface.shortDescription: Strategic quality governance for coding tasks.
interface.longDescription: Adds a pragmatic engineering governance layer for software work: project-document discovery, project health audits, intelligent code reuse and composition prospecting, scoped MCP and skill guidance, strategic pre-planning, diff contracts, architecture and security review, quality gates, and auditable progress records.
defaultPrompt: Govern this coding task with strategic intake, a diff contract, implementation, and validation.
Review this proposed change against architecture, security, maintainability, and test quality.
Audit this project and recommend scoped MCPs, skills, docs, and quality gates before implementation.
Find reusable code and prospect a lean composition layer before adding new logic.
